Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award - Judge Goldsmith recuses himself. This motion will be heard by Judge Stewart in Dept. 206 on March 16, 2015 at 10:15 a.m. Judge : Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.

Petitioner Wells Fargo Advisors, Llc'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES (ON COURTCALL) - ATTY. TIMOTHY N. WILL OF ALBERT & WILL LLP, TEL. NO. (310)257-9363, MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: John K. Stewart; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-24-2015 Continued To Mar-16-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to March 16, 2015 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 24, 2015 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
